list.title: Habari!
list.code:
# Scratch: sawa na block ya "say Habari!"
print("Habari!")

list.title: Uliza jina lako
list.code:
# Scratch: sawa na block ya "ask and wait"
jina = input("Jina lako ni nani? ")
print("Habari, " + jina + "!")

list.title: Kikokotoo
list.code:
# Scratch: sawa na block ya "+ operator"
a = int(input("Nambari ya kwanza: "))
b = int(input("Nambari ya pili: "))
print("Kujumlisha: " + str(a + b))
print("Kutoa: " + str(a - b))
print("Kuzidisha: " + str(a * b))

list.title: Kama...basi
Salamu tofauti
Rudia
Kuhesabu chini
list.code:
# Scratch: sawa na block ya "change by" + "repeat until"
nambari = 10
while nambari > 0:
    print(nambari)
    nambari = nambari - 1
print("Ruka! \U0001f680")

list.title: Ni ipi?
list.code:
# Scratch: sawa na block ya "item of list"
matunda = ["tofaa", "chungwa", "zabibu", "jordgubbar", "embe"]
print("Orodha ya matunda: " + str(matunda))
nambari = int(input("Unataka kuona ipi? (1-5): "))
print("Nambari " + str(nambari) + " ni " + matunda[nambari - 1] + "!")

list.title: Hesabu herufi
list.code:
# Scratch: sawa na block ya "length of"
neno = input("Andika neno lako unalolipenda: ")
print("\"" + neno + "\" lina herufi " + str(len(neno)) + "!")
for herufi in neno:
    print("-> " + herufi)

list.title: Bahati yako
list.code:
# Scratch: sawa na block ya "pick random"
import random
jibu = random.choice(["Bahati nzuri sana!", "Bahati nzuri!", "Bahati kidogo", "Kawaida", "Jaribu tena"])
print("Bahati yako ni... " + jibu + "!")

list.title: Mchezo wa kutabiri nambari
list.code:
# Mchezo unaounganisha block nyingi!
import random
jibu = random.randint(1, 10)
print("Tabiri nambari kutoka 1 hadi 10!")

majaribio = 0
while True:
    dhana = int(input("Ingiza nambari: "))
    majaribio = majaribio + 1
    if dhana == jibu:
        print("Sawa! \U0001f389 Umepata kwa majaribio " + str(majaribio) + "!")
        break
    elif dhana < jibu:
        print("Juu zaidi!")
    else:
        print("Chini zaidi!")
